_comment: Illustrative LLM output. Actual message copy will vary.

key_points: RBAC ships August 15 — leads blocked on permissions checklist can be targeted now
Microsoft Teams integration ships August 30 — start adding to enterprise proposals
Audit log ships August 29 — pairs with RBAC for full enterprise security story
ETAs are confirmed, not tentative — plan your pipeline accordingly
messages.tone: Direct, deal-focused. Give sales the dates they need to make commitments.
do_not_share: RM006 (Gantt deferral — creates confusion about Q4 scope)

messages.suggested_timing: Week 1 — before reps have committed Gantt to prospects
key_points: Gantt chart view pushed to Q4 — do not commit to enterprise prospects this quarter
If a deal is blocked on Gantt: escalate to PM for a specific commitment conversation

messages.suggested_timing: On iOS GA (July 31) and Teams launch (August 30)
key_points: iOS app is now generally available — invite your team to download from the App Store
Microsoft Teams integration launches August 30 — sync updates directly in Teams
do_not_share: RM001 (RBAC — share when GA, not before)

key_points: iOS GA ships July 31 — our first mobile milestone
Enterprise security (RBAC + audit log) ships August — unblocks a segment of the pipeline
Teams integration ships August 30 — broader integration story
messages.tone: Celebratory but grounded. Connect to company metrics.
do_not_share: RM006 (Gantt deferral — discuss in product team, not all-hands)

key_points: iOS app is now available for all users — download from the App Store today
Microsoft Teams integration now available — manage projects without leaving Teams

sensitive_items.reason: RBAC affects user permissions model — premature announcement may confuse admins or create support burden
sensitive_items.recommended_handling: Announce only on GA date. Notify enterprise CSMs 1 week before GA for proactive customer communication.

sensitive_items.reason: Android v1 is beta — not GA. Premature announcement creates public expectation before product is stable.
sensitive_items.recommended_handling: Internal communication only until Q4 GA. Sales may reference as 'Android coming Q4'.

affected_groups: enterprise customers with active Gantt requests
deferral_notices.suggested_message: Gantt chart view is now scheduled for Q4 2026. We've prioritised enterprise security (RBAC, audit log) and mobile GA this quarter to address higher-urgency customer needs. We appreciate your patience and will reach out when Gantt is available.

communication_calendar.action: Brief sales on Q3 ETAs (RBAC, Teams, audit log) and Gantt deferral
iOS GA announcement — changelog, newsletter, all-hands update
RBAC GA — CSM email to enterprise customers + sales update
Audit log GA — enterprise CSM notification
Teams integration GA — changelog + enterprise email
Board update: iOS GA, enterprise security shipped, ARR pipeline impact
